metadata.title: Sanzu — Trusted Case Workflow
metadata.description: Trusted case workflow platform for agencies and families.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

home.tagline: Trusted case workflow platform for agencies and families.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear plan tiers with transparent usage and billing. Start with a 30-day free trial.
pricing.inicialFeatures: Onboarding, billing, and case lifecycle operations.
pricing.profissionalFeatures: Role-aware collaboration and document review workflows.
pricing.agenciaFeatures1: Governance oversight and platform KPI controls.
pricing.agenciaFeatures2: Priority support and policy drilldown operations.
pricing.enterpriseDescription: Custom pricing for large agencies with dedicated support.
pricing.trialNotice: All plans include a 30-day free trial. Annual billing saves 2 months. VAT (23%) applies. Card payment only.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Guides and reference content for onboarding and operational success.

trust.title: Trust
trust.subtitle: Security, compliance, and reliability posture for agencies and families.
trust.tenantIsolation: Tenant isolation with strict workspace boundaries.
trust.auditability: Immutable auditability for lifecycle and policy actions.
trust.policyControls: Policy controls with role-safe approval workflows.

demo.title: Request a Demo
demo.subtitle: Public conversion route for qualified demo intent.
demo.description: Tell us your team context so we can tailor the walkthrough.
demo.validationNote: Validation: business email and consent acknowledgement are required before submit.
demo.submitError: Unable to submit demo request. Please verify required fields and try again.
demo.privacyConsent: By submitting you agree to Sanzu contact processing under <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
demo.successSubtitle: Success state for demo conversion flow.
demo.successMessage: We received your request and will contact you with next steps within one business day.
demo.successNext: Next: check your inbox for scheduling options or return to <link>Pricing</link>.

start.title: Start with Sanzu
start.subtitle: Public conversion route that starts account creation and onboarding.
start.description: Create your tenant workspace and primary admin profile.
start.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service
start.validationNote: Validation: agency name, business email, and terms consent are required.
start.submitError: Unable to start account creation. Check required fields and terms acceptance.
start.termsConsent: Continuing means you accept the <link>Terms of Service</link>.
start.successSubtitle: Success state for start-account conversion flow.
start.successMessage: Your workspace setup is in progress. Continue to onboarding steps from your invite link.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Public legal route for privacy and data handling disclosures.
privacy.dataProcessing: Data is processed only for service delivery, security, and support obligations.
privacy.tenantIsolation: Tenant workspace data remains logically isolated from other tenants.
privacy.auditRetention: Audit logs are retained according to configured policy and legal requirements.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Public legal route for service terms and contractual conditions.
terms.authorizedUse: Service use is limited to authorised agency personnel and invited participants.
terms.accessControls: Role-based access controls are enforced as part of the security model.
terms.billingTerms: Billing and subscription terms apply according to selected plan and tenant policy.
